Form templates

Application Form Template

Embed our Application Form Template into your website for free. With the HTML code provided, it is not necessary to create a Application Form yourself. Immediately after inserting it into your website, the form is ready to go, including delivery by email.

Job
Personal data
Application documents

Possible file types: DOC, PDF, JPG. Maximum file size: 10 MB.

Get form

Why an online form for job applications makes sense

An online job application form enables website operators to make their recruitment process more efficient, structured and user-friendly. It brings numerous benefits for both companies and applicants.

A key advantage of an application form is the standardization of applications. Predefined fields allow applicants to specifically upload the required information such as contact details, professional qualifications and relevant documents. This ensures a uniform presentation and makes it easier to compare applications.

Another aspect is the perception of the company. A professionally designed application form leaves a positive impression on potential candidates and strengthens employer branding.

Overall, an online application form is a modern solution that combines efficiency, professionalism and ease of use. Companies that use this approach not only stand out from the competition, but at the same time optimize their internal processes and improve the experience for applicants.

How can I build an application form?

With our form template, you save yourself the trouble of writing the required HTML code and programming. Copy the source code of the HTML template directly into your website. No download or programming knowledge in languages ​​such as HTML, CSS or PHP is required to set it up. The form submissions are automatically handled by our backend service, which sends you the form entries directly by email.

Our ready-to-use sample form is structured like a standard online form for applying for job vacancies. It offers fields for selecting the desired position, entering personal information and the option of sending a cover letter and CV as a file. The user also confirms with a checkbox that they agree to the processing of their data for the request. This is necessary in order to comply with data protection requirements.

The free template offers everything you need for quick installation and reliable communication with your site visitors.

Professional Design

The design of our form is professional and flexible. If you want to change the display or the input fields, the HTML code can simply be modified to suit your requirements. It is also ideal for use with mobile devices. We have implemented the display as a responsive design for mobile-friendly use.

Notifications

The form entries are sent directly to your email address after submission. In our administration interface you can make the settings for the shipment transmission and the desired delivery addresses. You will receive the access data for this when you set up this form. As an alternative to email notification, you can also use the Form.taxi app, with which you can receive new form shipments live on your smartphone.

Spam protection

The first-class spam protection prevents the form from being misused for advertising and fraudulent messages. Form.taxi combines several approaches to achieve the highest possible detection rate. The in-house spam filter analyzes the submitted text content for known patterns and keywords and continually learns through ongoing operation and adapts to current trends.

Data protection compliant

In the form, the user gives consent to data processing by activating a click box. To process the form entries, our service offers the necessary data protection in accordance with the GDPR (EU General Data Protection Regulation). You can find further information on this in our privacy policy.

Set up Application Form for free

Click on the following button to display the HTML source code of the form, which you can copy and paste directly into the desired position in the HTML code of your website. The setup of our sample form is completed in a few minutes and it can be used immediately by site visitors.

Set up Application Form

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know

We have designed our service as a practical solution for the simplest possible use.

If you still have questions or need support with the installation on your website, please do not hesitate to contact us. We will be happy to help you!

Our template is an example of a form that is suitable for submitting applications on websites. The source code of our HTML form can and may be modified and adapted to your requirements. For example, to add additional input fields. Please send us a message if you need support with this.

Our application form comes with a pre-designed layout that is intended to be usable on as many websites as possible. To adapt the layout to your individual website, you can change the CSS code in the source code of our form template or even remove it completely to create the CSS code yourself. If you need help with this, any web designer can do it. Of course, we are also happy to help you set up the contact form optimally for your website. Just send us a message.

Data protection-compliant use of our form is important to us. That is why we adhere to the requirements of data protection standards such as the GDPR. To comply with this, our form includes a checkbox with which the user gives their consent to data processing. For the privacy policy on your website, we have prepared a suitable text passage that refers to the use of Form.taxi for processing data inputs. You will receive further information on this in the form setup process.

By clicking on the send button, the form entries are transmitted to the Form.taxi backend service. Form.taxi then takes over the further processing, storage of the entries and notification by e-mail. The settings for processing and notification can be configured in the online panel according to your own requirements.

Let's keep in touch.

If you would like to contact us personally, please send us a message.

GDPR compliant CCPA compliant
